name: AWP | 暴怒野兽
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been custom painted with a beastly creature in psychedelic colors. You really want to impress me Booth? Make this black light sensitive - Rona Sabri, Rising Star
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 这把武器使用残忍的生物的图案，搭配迷幻的颜色进行了涂装。 你真的的想给我留下深刻的印象吗布兹？用刺眼的黑光证明给我看吧 - 明日之星罗纳.萨布里
